name: Warrior's Passkey
description:
This silver skeleton key is warm to the touch. While holding the key in its key form, you can use an action to cast the {@spell Knock} spell from the key.
{"type": "entries", "name": "Transforming the Key", "entries": ["While holding the key, you can use a bonus action to transform it into a magic longsword. You are considered proficient with the sword, and you have a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with it. On a hit, the sword deals {@damage 1d10} force damage. The item remains in its
